items.description:
A faint recollection from a creature once kindred to myth.
The echo stirs toward the forgotten past, but the Shrumb no longer responds.

The Shrumb once looked upon the world and named it.
Now it only moves through it.
This is the residue of a will that wore itself away.

The Shrumb was not born lost.

In the elder days, this aspect gave it bearing, turning it toward a station that answered from beyond the forest.

The station is silent now. Rarely, upon death, the essence sublimates, and goes on seeking the signal that taught it where to face.
